MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Nephtali Gonzales, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Feb-05-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-27-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-21-2018 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Nephtali Gonzales, Esq. of Nephta Law, 415.756.4939, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No other appearance by any party or counsel.

There being no other appearance, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
Defendants 1500 Majestic LLC and Vikas Patel's demurrer to the eleventh cause of action for violation of Bus. & Prof. Code17200 and the request for punitive damages in the complaint filed by plaintiff Benito Nunez's is overruled in its entirety. Mr. Nunez has alleged sufficient facts supporting standing to sue in his individual capacity for violation of section 17200 and he may seek a restitutionary remedy for recovery of unpaid wages per Cortez v. Purolator Air Filtration Products Co. (2000) 23 Cal.4th 163, 177. A pleading challenge to a request for punitive damages should be made by a motion to strike, not a demurrer. In all events, Mr. Nunez has alleged sufficient facts showing malicious and fraudulent conduct by defendants supporting a punitive damages award based on his tort claim for wrongful termination in violation of public policy. Order signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
